```

**Generation Strategy:**
1. All scenarios are grounded in real Baku professional contexts (fintech, oil PMO, banking transformation, software companies) to create authentic recognition for Azerbaijani users, not generic Western PM textbook cases.
2. IRT parameters are calibrated so easy items (irt_b = -1.5 to -1.8) serve as confidence builders for novice PMs, medium items (0.1 to 0.4) differentiate practitioners from novices, and hard items (1.5 to 2.0) identify senior PMs who operate at the systems/org level — matching the 3PL model in the assessment engine.
3. SJT and open-ended items are designed around real PM dilemmas with no obviously correct answer to a non-practitioner, ensuring the questions distinguish AURA-level competency from surface familiarity with PM terminology.
